title: Smurf Cat In Minecraft
description: We live, we love, we lie, and we hunt for bundles! Welcome the Smurf Cat to your Minecraft worlds!
body:
# Smurf Cat in Minecraft

We live, we love, we lie, and we hunt for bundles! Welcome the Smurf Cat to your Minecraft worlds!


## Acknowledgements

 - [Nate Hallinan for the original Smurf Cat](https://natehallinan.com/projects/Z53ON?album_id=910810)
 - [Timber Forge for all the tutorials I used](https://www.youtube.com/@TimberForge)


### We love Smurf Cat, right?

Since the little cute creature got created back in 2011, people have made this thing go viral over and over again. So after the creature went viral again on TikTok with the saying "We live. We love. We lie." I set out with one simple goal, to turn the Smurf Cat into an actual Minecraft cat.
### Features

- Perfect size
- Makes a perfect "pet"
- Cute
- Runs around or just stands around watching
- Sings its iconic catchphrase
- Has all important details
- Works in 1.20.1
- Has spawn egg and spawn command using triggers
